welcome.start.1: To start a game, click on "Lobby" in the upper left corner
welcome.start.3: Enter a game name and click "Create game"
welcome.start.4: If a game already exists, just join it
welcome.start.5: The game can be started once three or four players have joined
welcome.thanks: Thanks to Chris Aguilar for the images of the cards:
game.keepingCard: Place your card here if you'd like to keep it
game.keepingCardQuestion: Player asked to keep the following card
game.name: Name
